LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_mini.label: Ultimate Auto Repair Station
LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_mini.description: An archotech automated repair station that continuously restores the durability of buildings and items within a designated area. All stations on the same map share their work area and repair logs — any single station with power keeps the whole system running.
LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_mini.label: Ultimate Auto Repair Station (Protable)
LanguageData.UltimateAutoRepair_mini.description: An archotech automated repair station that continuously restores the durability of buildings and items within a designated area. All stations on the same map share their work area and repair logs — any single station with power keeps the whole system running.
